page: Microsoft Azure D128ads_v7 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the Dadsv7 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by AMD processors. The instance is configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes 7559 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D128ads_v7 offers a high-density resource profile suitable for enterprise-scale workloads that require substantial compute capacity paired with large local storage volumes. The balanced memory-to-core ratio and extensive local storage make it well-suited for large relational databases, data warehousing, enterprise applications, and heavy general-purpose processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D128ads_v7 is a high-capacity virtual machine from the Dadsv7 family, built on the x86_64 architecture with AMD processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance is equipped with 7559 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource configuration provides a high-density environment for demanding enterprise applications. The combination of massive compute power, balanced memory allocation, and extensive local storage capacity makes this server type highly suitable for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and heavy general-purpose enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D128ads_v7 is a Dadsv7-family virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density virtual machine featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated cores, half a terabyte of memory, and extensive local storage.
